Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON_SCRIPT'
import json

with open\(r"C:\\Users\\martin\\Documents\\proyecto_integrador\\entregable_2\\Kapak-accusatory-main\\Code\\Proyecto_Final_MMIA_FRoh.ipynb", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Get full cell 46 and extract the complete result dict
cell = nb['cells'][46]
source = ''.join\(cell['source']\) if isinstance\(cell['source'], list\) else cell['source']

# Find the evaluate_model function signature
print\("="*80\)
print\("COMPLETE COLUMN NAMES FROM RESULT DICTIONARY"\)
print\("="*80\)

lines = source.split\('\\n'\)
in_result_block = False
result_lines = []

for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if 'result = {' in line:
        in_result_block = True
    
    if in_result_block:
        result_lines.append\(line\)
        if 'best_params' in line:  # This is the last assignment before end of function
            break

# Extract unique keys
import re
keys = set\(re.findall\(r"'\([^']+\)':", '\\n'.join\(result_lines\)\)\)
for key in sorted\(keys\):
    print\(f"  - {key}"\)

print\("\\nTotal columns:", len\(keys\)\)

import sys, pandas as pd

base = r'C:\\Users\\martin\\Documents\\proyecto_integrador\\entregable_2'
files = [
    'test_embeddings_text-embedding-3-large.csv',
    'train_embeddings_balanced_total_sinonimos_text-embedding-3-large.csv',
    'train_embeddings_total_augmented_data_text-embedding-3-large.csv',
]
for f in files:
    try:
        df = pd.read_csv\(f'{base}/{f}', nrows=2\)
        print\(f'{f}'\)
        print\(f'  shape: {df.shape}  |  cols[-3:]: {list\(df.columns[-3:]\)}  |  label?: {\\"label\\" in df.columns}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'{f}: ERROR -> {e}'\)
